title: Surgeon Vacancy at Stryker India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Stryker India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Stryker India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Stryker India:
Stryker India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India!
